justification.primary_order_col: transformation.logic_description: 'dedupe silver.orders on order_id keeping the latest row by order_date'
justification.primary_cast_map: transformation.logic_description: 'already cast upstream, no further casts needed here'
justification.join_key: transformation.logic_description: 'left join silver.order_item_totals on order_id'; order_id present in both sources and target columns
justification.derived_columns: transformation.logic_description: 'concatenate city and country as customer_location separated by ", "'; city and country both present in silver.orders
